description: Coordinate the refactoring divide-and-conquer workflow and preserve runtime inputs, including duplicate-scavenge mode markers.

input.description: Workflow arguments. Optional workflowInput fields include targetPaths, excludePaths, maxSlices, executionMode, refactoringMode, requestedOutcome, constraints, verificationPreferences, and planPath.

output.description: Return JSON preserving refactoringMode, the operator request, and routing constraints.
